name: hoc/file-upload-zone
description: A drag-and-drop file-upload area HOC that visualizes drop zones, file previews, upload-progress bars, and error states. Combines FileField primitives with custom dropzone styling, progress indicators, and a file-list summary. Provides FileUploadZone, FileUploadZoneTrigger, FileUploadZoneList, FileUploadZoneItem, and FileUploadZoneProgress sub-components with full i18n support via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Bulk document uploaders in CRM or project-management tools with drag-and-drop support
Image-gallery upload flows showing thumbnails, file names, and per-file progress bars
CSV/JSON import wizards with file-type validation and row-count preview before ingestion
Profile-avatar and cover-photo uploaders with single-file constraints and crop suggestions
usage: import { FileUploadZone, FileUploadZoneTrigger, FileUploadZoneList, FileUploadZoneItem, FileUploadZoneProgress } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/file-upload-zone"
